text: Good morning Jarvis! What's on the calendar for this Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, July 27. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick log: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: I've saved tonight's journal. Sleep well, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
